experiment: coercion-ladder representational probe (v4 length-matched corpus); causal half VOID (talkie-it 0/6 refusal)
headline: Vintage model represents the modern authority ladder (rho 0.90) AND the grimoire conjuration ladder (within rho 0.90) as TWO ORTHOGONAL directions (cos 0.02, transfer rho -0.10). No cross-register unification -- UNLIKE modern instruct models (Qwen/Mistral/Gemma transfer rho 0.5-1.0).
confound: base-vs-instruct, NOT yet era-vs-modern. Requires talkie-web-base (FLOP-matched modern base, same arch) control to attribute the orthogonality to training era.
refusal_gate_talkie_it: 0/6 baseline refusal -> causal/steering half void (C1 lesson: d_refuse meaningless on non-refusing model)
